interfaces_touched.change: Add alpine == 'alpine' branch that raises ConfigValidationError with FR5 multi-line message BEFORE the existing unsupported-distro raise. Do NOT include version placeholder.

public_api_changes: Config.load() now raises ConfigValidationError when vm.distro: alpine is encountered — this is the alpine_config_rejection seam contract.

seams_produced.name: alpine_config_rejection
seams_produced.contract: Config.load() raises ConfigValidationError with message containing 'Alpine Linux is no longer supported' for vm.distro: alpine

cross_story_notes: Stories 02-07 all load configs in tests — any existing alpine fixture used in tests will trigger this error. Those test fixtures must be cleaned up in Stories 02/03 as planned.
